CustomField.description: For partial rent periods, the rent is calculated based on two prorate options: Actual Number of Days in Month/Year: Rent is prorated as ((Period Days/actual days in the month) ∗ Base Rent). The number of days in a month can be 28, 29, 30, or 31. 30/360: Rent is prorated as ((Period Days/30) ∗ Base Rent). This applies to monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, and annual rental periods.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: For partial rent periods, the rent is calculated based on two prorate options: Actual Number of Days in Month/Year: Rent is prorated as ((Period Days/actual days in the month) ∗ Base Rent). The number of days in a month can be 28, 29, 30, or 31. 30/360: Rent is prorated as ((Period Days/30) ∗ Base Rent). This applies to monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, and annual rental periods.
CustomField.label: Pro-Rata Number Of Days

value.fullName: Actual number of days in month/year
value.label: Actual number of days in month/year
